_comment: Reference blocks for ~/.claude/settings.json — ritual never merges these automatically (no JSON surgery on your settings). `ritual init --skills` installs skills/agents/hooks as files; add these keys yourself if missing, and `ritual doctor` checks for them.
_mcp: The codex MCP server is registered per-user, not in settings.json: `claude mcp add --scope user codex -- codex mcp-server`. Optional consensus tier: `claude mcp add --scope user pal --env GEMINI_API_KEY=<key> -- uvx --from git+https://github.com/BeehiveInnovations/pal-mcp-server.git pal-mcp-server`.
